text: New Year’s Day — Wishing you a year of renewal and purpose.
Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom. — Aristotle
Sell your cleverness and buy bewilderment. — Rumi
Arise, awake, and stop not till the goal is reached. — Swami Vivekananda
You have to dream before your dreams can come true. — A.P.J. Abdul Kalam
Let yourself be silently drawn by the strange pull of what you really love. — Rumi
Happiness depends upon ourselves. — Aristotle
Where there is ruin, there is hope for a treasure. — Rumi
The energy of the mind is the essence of life. — Aristotle
Faith is the bird that feels the light when the dawn is still dark. — Rabindranath Tagore

Valentine’s Day — Celebrate love in all its forms.
Raise your words, not your voice. — Rumi
Leap Day — Take the extra day to do something meaningful.
Be kind, for everyone you meet is fighting a hard battle. — Plato
Dream is not that which you see while sleeping; it is something that does not let you sleep. — A.P.J. Abdul Kalam
Let the beauty we love be what we do. — Rumi
Nowruz — Wishing you renewal, prosperity, and joy.
Turn your wounds into wisdom. — Rumi
It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light. — Aristotle
Eid al-Fitr — Eid Mubarak. May your heart be filled with peace and gratitude.
If you want to shine like a sun, first burn like a sun. — A.P.J. Abdul Kalam
What you seek is seeking you. — Rumi
Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet. — Aristotle
In a gentle way, you can shake the world. — Mahatma Gandhi
I slept and dreamt that life was joy; I awoke and saw that life was service. — Rabindranath Tagore
As the first buds unfurl, so too, let our spirits awaken with the promise of renewal.
Like the blossoming trees, embrace the vibrant energy of spring and let your dreams take root.
Let the warmth of the sun and the scent of new blossoms remind us to celebrate the joy of Noruz – a time for fresh beginnings.
With every passing day, spring awakens, mirroring the renewal of hope within our hearts.
May the vibrant colors of spring remind us to embrace the beauty of life, just as Noruz celebrates the bounty of the earth.
Like the first shoots pushing through the soil, let’s nurture our ambitions and strive for growth, inspired by Noruz’s spirit of prosperity.
The gentle rain of spring washes away the old, bringing forth a canvas of renewal – a reminder of Noruz’s purifying rituals.
With the arrival of spring, let’s sow the seeds of kindness and compassion, mirroring the generosity of Noruz.
The birdsong of spring is a symphony of renewal, echoing the hope and optimism associated with Noruz’s joyous celebrations.
Let the blossoming flowers remind us that even after the harshest winter, beauty and life will always return – like the traditions of Noruz.
Embrace the vibrant hues of spring, just as Noruz calls us to celebrate the abundant blessings of the new year.
With every step forward, let’s carry the spirit of Noruz – a commitment to growth, prosperity, and harmonious living.
Spring’s gentle breezes carry whispers of renewal, a comforting reminder of Noruz’s promise of a brighter future.
Like the unfolding petals, let our intentions blossom into action, inspired by the positive energy of Noruz.
The lengthening days of spring represent a new beginning, a perfect time to reflect and embrace the spirit of Noruz – a time for fresh starts.
Let the vibrant colors of spring fill your heart with joy, mirroring the celebratory spirit of Noruz – a time for connection and gratitude.
As spring awakens, so too, let our souls find renewal, embracing the timeless traditions of Noruz.
May the fragrant blossoms of spring inspire us to cultivate beauty and harmony in our lives, just as Noruz celebrates the earth's bounty.
With the arrival of spring, let’s honor the earth’s renewal, remembering Noruz's dedication to celebrating the natural world.
Let the warmth of the sun and the gentle breeze of spring remind us to embrace the spirit of Noruz – a time for new beginnings and joyful celebrations.
Like the blossoming trees, let our spirits rise with the promise of spring, echoing Noruz’s celebration of new life.
May the beauty of spring fill your heart with joy and gratitude, inspired by the traditions of Noruz – a celebration of abundance and hope.
As spring unfolds, let’s nurture our dreams and aspirations, just as Noruz encourages us to embrace new possibilities.
With every sunrise, let’s greet the day with gratitude and optimism, honoring Noruz’s spirit of renewal and celebration.
Let the vibrant colors of spring remind us to appreciate the beauty of the present moment, inspired by Noruz's joyous traditions.
Embrace the renewal of spring, carrying the spirit of Noruz – a time for reflection, gratitude, and joyful celebration.
Like the blooming flowers, let our spirits blossom with hope and joy, reflecting Noruz’s celebration of new beginnings.
With the arrival of spring, let’s release the burdens of the past and embrace the possibilities of the future, inspired by Noruz's message of renewal.
May the gentle rain of spring nourish your soul, just as Noruz’s rituals cleanse and refresh the spirit.
Celebrate the arrival of spring, honoring the spirit of Noruz – a time for connection, gratitude, and joyous celebration.
As April draws to a close, let us carry the spirit of renewal and celebration into May, inspired by Noruz's timeless traditions.
